title: TARDIS Refined: Audrey's Additions
description: Adds many exteriors and consoles to TARDIS Refined!
body:
![Logo text - TARDIS Refined: Audrey's Additions](https://i.imgur.com/AU4MzgR.png)

This addon introduces a variety of shell options, custom-modelled blocks, console units, and desktop themes to **[TARDIS Refined](https://modrinth.com/mod/tardis-refined)**! Play with your favourite TARDISes from the show and beyond!  
![The Addon's 2018 Police Box and 1973 Console models](https://i.imgur.com/BeoE6NH.png)

Want to discuss the Addon? Report a bug? Talk TARDISes? Join us in the community Discord!
[
![The Discord logo](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6257adef93867e50d84d30e2/67ac9b4644222140ae614b06_Wordmark.svg)
](https://discord.gg/eFdE64heXs)

(Mod icon by unofficial.lucifer!)

## Features  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


### Desktop Themes  
- **Brachacki Interior (1963)**  
- **Liminton Interior (1973)**  
- **Secondary Interior (1976)**  

### Console Units  
- **Brachacki Console (1963)** *  
- **Sharp Console (1971)** *  
- **Newbery Console (1976)** *  
- **Kelt Console (1983)** *
- **Hudolin Console (1996)** *
- **Human Nature Console (2002)** *  
- **Toyota Console (2012)** *  

### Shells  
- **Police Box (1963)** *  
- **Police Box (1966)** *
- **Police Box (1976)** *  
- **Police Box (1996)** *
- **Police Box (2010)** *
- **Police Box (2018)** *  
- **SIDRAT** *  
- **Traken Clock** *

(*Currently has variants*)  

### Blocks/Items  
- **Food Machine & Food Cubes**  
- **Knossos Throne**  
- **Dyeable Armchair**  
- **Astral Map**  
- **Ceiling Canopy**  
- **Brachacki & Liminton Monitors**  
- **Foldout Beds**  
- **Light Columns (Left & Right)**  

</details>
